mapper.sql: id, calcId, monthDate, warehouseCode, modelNo, avaQty, ordQty, transQty, inTime, outTime, propertyId, inventoryTypeCode, ppl, customerNo, groupCustomerNo, projectNo, salesInfoNo, deptNo, freq, mean, eprice, status, applyOutQty, analyseTime, delayDate, delayConsume, applyPsn, applyTime, dlvDate
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.stock_analysis
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.stock_analysis (id, calcId, monthDate, warehouseCode, modelNo, avaQty, ordQty, transQty, inTime, outTime, propertyId, inventoryTypeCode, ppl, customerNo, groupCustomerNo, projectNo, salesInfoNo, deptNo, freq, mean, eprice, status, applyOutQty, analyseTime, delayDate, delayConsume, applyPsn, applyTime, dlvDate) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{calcid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{monthdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avaqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{intime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{outtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{propertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{freq,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{mean,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{applyoutqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{analysetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delaydate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{delayconsume,jdbcType=BIT}, #{applypsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dlvdate,jdbcType=DATE})

mapper.update:
update dbo.stock_analysis
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
calcId = #{record.calcid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
monthDate = #{record.monthdate,jdbcType=DATE},
warehouseCode = #{record.warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avaQty = #{record.avaqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ordQty = #{record.ordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transQty = #{record.transqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inTime = #{record.intime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
outTime = #{record.outtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
propertyId = #{record.propertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventoryTypeCode = #{record.inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
groupCustomerNo = #{record.groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectNo = #{record.projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
freq = #{record.freq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mean = #{record.mean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
applyOutQty = #{record.applyoutqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
analyseTime = #{record.analysetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delayDate = #{record.delaydate,jdbcType=DATE},
delayConsume = #{record.delayconsume,jdbcType=BIT},
applyPsn = #{record.applypsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applyTime = #{record.applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=DATE},

update dbo.stock_analysis set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, calcId = #{record.calcid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, monthDate = #{record.monthdate,jdbcType=DATE}, warehouseCode = #{record.warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avaQty = #{record.avaqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ordQty = #{record.ordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transQty = #{record.transqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inTime = #{record.intime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, outTime = #{record.outtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, propertyId = #{record.propertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventoryTypeCode = #{record.inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groupCustomerNo = #{record.groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectNo = #{record.projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, freq = #{record.freq,jdbcType=INTEGER}, mean = #{record.mean,jdbcType=INTEGER}, eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, applyOutQty = #{record.applyoutqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, analyseTime = #{record.analysetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delayDate = #{record.delaydate,jdbcType=DATE}, delayConsume = #{record.delayconsume,jdbcType=BIT}, applyPsn = #{record.applypsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, applyTime = #{record.applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=DATE}

update dbo.stock_analysis
calcId = #{calcid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
monthDate = #{monthdate,jdbcType=DATE},
warehouseCode = #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avaQty = #{avaqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ordQty = #{ordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transQty = #{transqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inTime = #{intime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
outTime = #{outtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
propertyId = #{propertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inventoryTypeCode = #{inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
groupCustomerNo = #{groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectNo = #{projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
freq = #{freq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mean = #{mean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
eprice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
applyOutQty = #{applyoutqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
analyseTime = #{analysetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delayDate = #{delaydate,jdbcType=DATE},
delayConsume = #{delayconsume,jdbcType=BIT},
applyPsn = #{applypsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
applyTime = #{applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlvDate = #{dlvdate,jdbcType=DATE},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.stock_analysis set calcId = #{calcid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, monthDate = #{monthdate,jdbcType=DATE}, warehouseCode = #{warehousecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avaQty = #{avaqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ordQty = #{ordqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transQty = #{transqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inTime = #{intime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, outTime = #{outtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, propertyId = #{propertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inventoryTypeCode = #{inventorytypecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ppl = #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, groupCustomerNo = #{groupcustomerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectNo = #{projectno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salesInfoNo = #{salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, freq = #{freq,jdbcType=INTEGER}, mean = #{mean,jdbcType=INTEGER}, eprice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, applyOutQty = #{applyoutqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, analyseTime = #{analysetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delayDate = #{delaydate,jdbcType=DATE}, delayConsume = #{delayconsume,jdbcType=BIT}, applyPsn = #{applypsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, applyTime = #{applytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dlvDate = #{dlvdate,jdbcType=DATE} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
